content.situation: 朋友帮你把一堆箱子从车上搬进屋里，你表达感谢
content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me with all these boxes!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我搬这些箱子！
content.responseTemplate: ___, it was no trouble at all.
content.hint: 回应感谢时，常用表达是表示不客气，强调帮助是小事

content.situation: 你帮同事搬完办公家具后，他笑着说：'You saved me from a backache!'
content.speakerText: You saved me from a backache!
content.speakerTextCn: 你救了我，不然我腰都要断了！
content.responseTemplate: ___, I'm just glad I could help.
content.hint: 当对方强调你的帮助解决了困难时，常用表达是表达乐意帮忙的态度
content.knowledgePoint: 回应强调帮助重要性的感谢

content.situation: 你帮邻居搬完洗衣机后，他拍拍你肩膀说：'I couldn't have done it without you.'
content.speakerText: I couldn't have done it without you.
content.speakerTextCn: 没有你我根本搬不动这洗衣机。
content.responseTemplate: ___, really. Anytime you need a hand!
content.hint: 当对方说‘没有你不行’时，回应应体现愿意持续帮助的友好态度
content.knowledgePoint: 表达持续愿意提供帮助的口语表达
